author: Besting
text: REVISED 2026-06-06: (1) tracker is a SEEDED plugin in the landing list (from default-config/), not a magic default. (2) Implicit founding is FINE: bare prime create+push to a resolvable remote; --stealth opts out; push-fail (no perms) -> silent stealth-local fallback. (3) Silent-empty mitigation = tracker WARNING (diagnostic, not authority): prime fetches origin:balls/config anyway; if landing tasks_branch is still the SEEDED DEFAULT (not user-set, not stealth) AND the synced config names a different store, warn 'run bl install / prime --install'. spec bl-2e26 §12/§16.
